problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
